text: the medicine in the beginning provided about 30% relief in pain, but as time progressed it only provided about 10% pain relief. This being said, it does provide some mental relief from chronic pain. and it relieves some of the muscle stiffness. When I do not take this medicine it puts me in a bad mood and causes my stomach to ache (like bad hunger pains even though I am not hungry). After I take the medicine these symptions disappear. Its almost like withdrawal. Medicine was prescribed to be taken twice a day in combination with physcial therapy for back condition.
